comments: Approved based on direct evidence. git show --stat --name-status 4d136f8 matches the execution artifact exactly: README.md, README_zh-CN.md, tasks/v0.8-readme-workflow-enrichment/execution-result.json, and tasks/v0.8-readme-workflow-enrichment/result-review-packet.json only. README.md and README_zh-CN.md each explicitly list and explain all 17 built-in workflows in dedicated tables, and each includes a Custom Authoring section with a concrete YAML example (custom-deploy-pipeline) using bash nodes and is_isolated_reviewer.
